Petition For Order To Bring Trust Under Continuing Court Supervision And For Appt. Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Avid Alavi appearing for and with Elizabeth Adler.
The Court granted the petition (order signed in open court). The successor trustee should file an Inventory and Appraisal two weeks before 12/11/07. The first accounting of the successor trustee should be filed two weeks before 11/18/08.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
